LineComment.Text: Gripper prêt à Charger / Décharger une pièce
Test Stop after Emptying with only one Shuttle
Test Stop after Emptying with two Shuttle
If Blowing : Pos. Blowing else Pos. Load/Unload
Load Gripper Closed according to dry run working mode
Load Gripper Closed according to dry run working mode
Conditions d'arrêt en Mode Semi Auto
Conditions d'arrêt en Mode Semi Auto
Conditions d'arrêt en Mode Semi Auto
Axis U - Position Set point according to start request
Axis V - Position Set point according to start request
Axis W - Position Set point according to start request
